en.extract:
The Buru cuckooshrike (Coracina fortis) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae.
It is endemic to Indonesia.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.
It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Buru cuckooshrike''' ('''''Coracina fortis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Indonesia]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

zh.extract:
布鲁鹃鵙（学名：Coracina fortis）是山椒鸟科鸦鹃鵙属的一种。为印度尼西亚的特有种。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地森林以及亚热带或热带的湿润山地。该物种受栖息地破坏的威胁。


参考文献
BirdLife International. Coracina fortis. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2009.   [2010-10-20] （英语）.
